props.name: gradientColors
props.description: Array of hex colors (up to 8) forming the animated gradient. If one color is provided it is duplicated.

props.name: angle
props.description: Rotation of the gradient in degrees (0 = horizontal left→right).

props.name: noise
props.description: Strength of per‑pixel noise added to the final color (0 = clean).

props.name: blindCount
props.description: Target number of vertical blinds. Acts as an upper bound when blindMinWidth is set.

props.name: blindMinWidth
props.description: Minimum pixel width for each blind. Reduces effective blindCount if necessary to satisfy this width.

props.name: mouseDampening
props.description: Easing time constant (seconds) for the spotlight to follow the cursor. 0 = immediate.

props.name: mirrorGradient
props.description: Creates a mirrored ping‑pong gradient progression instead of a linear wrap.

props.name: spotlightRadius
props.description: Normalized spotlight radius relative to the shorter canvas dimension.

props.name: spotlightSoftness
props.description: Falloff exponent for spotlight edge. Higher = sharper edge (values >1 increase contrast).

props.name: spotlightOpacity
props.description: Overall intensity multiplier for the spotlight highlight.

props.name: distortAmount
props.description: Sin/cos warp intensity applied to UVs for subtle wavy distortion.

props.name: mixBlendMode
props.description: CSS mix-blend-mode applied to the canvas (e.g. 'screen', 'overlay', 'multiply').

props.name: paused
props.description: If true, stops rendering updates (freezing the current frame).

props.name: dpr
props.description: Overrides device pixel ratio; lower for performance, higher for sharpness.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class names for the root container.
